docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOHNNY AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ROAD 66 EXPRESS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
